name: DR MOTOR
description: Founded in 1964, DR MOTOR is a Japanese automobile manufacturer known for its innovative and high-performance vehicles. Initially focusing on motorcycles, the company expanded into automobiles in the late 1980s. Key milestones include the introduction of the first mass-produced electric vehicle (the EV-Cargo) in 1997 and the development of hybrid technology in partnership with Toyota. As of today, DR MOTOR remains a significant player in the automotive industry, producing a diverse range of vehicles that cater to various consumer needs.
